overall.description: A static nighttime scene at a snowy campsite featuring a burning campfire and a tent. The warm firelight illuminates the snow-covered ground against a dark starry sky, creating a serene winter atmosphere typical of survival game environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy campsite with campfire and tent

agents.ego_description: stationary at the campsite, observing the campfire and surrounding snowy landscape

entered.detail: burning fire with rising smoke providing warm orange illumination
dark canvas tent pitched on the snow to the right of the fire
snow-covered mound rising in the left background
snow-covered mound rising in the right background

segments.scene_description: A serene nighttime campsite scene with a burning campfire illuminating the snow-covered ground. A tent is pitched to the right while snow dunes rise in the background. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the flickering fire and rising smoke against the starry winter sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, serene nighttime vista of a snowy campsite where the warm glow of a campfire contrasts with the cold winter darkness. It begins with a focused view of the burning fire, which casts flickering light across the surrounding snow-covered ground. As the smoke rises steadily into the air, the camera captures the stillness of a pitched tent to the right and the soft curves of snow dunes in the background. The scene remains poised in this tranquil state, finally settling on the vast, starry sky that looms over the isolated wilderness.
